approvalPolicy.reason: User requested approval of all current Lounge Guru records before commit and push.

sources.coverage: Approved logo assets, brand categories, and source-to-brand mappings
sources.rightsNote: Internal Desk.Travel brand asset registry; use only approved logo assets and source mappings.

sources.coverage: Network lounge, dining, rest, refresh, and unwind records
sources.rightsNote: Use only the approved source workbook or public official pages; do not bypass account controls.

sources.publisher: Chase Sapphire Lounge by The Club
sources.coverage: Issuer-operated Sapphire Lounge locations and access policy
sources.rightsNote: Official public Chase page; parse only public location and policy text.

sources.coverage: Centurion and partner access program evidence
sources.rightsNote: Official public Amex page; treat partner eligibility as source evidence, not canonical operator data.

sources.coverage: Capital One Lounge and Landing locations
sources.rightsNote: Official public Capital One page; retain URL provenance for every imported location.

sources.coverage: Visa cardholder airport lounge access program evidence
sources.rightsNote: Official public Visa program page; import only public program and eligibility evidence.

sources.coverage: Mastercard cardholder airport lounge access program evidence
sources.rightsNote: Official public Mastercard Travel Pass page; retain URL provenance for every imported field.

sources.coverage: Citi travel card program and issuer evidence
sources.rightsNote: Official public Citi travel page; issuer-program mapping requires manual review before publishing records.

sources.coverage: DragonPass lounge network and partner access evidence
sources.rightsNote: Official public DragonPass page; import only public program and location evidence.

sources.coverage: Mastercard developer airport lounge program inventory and access evidence
sources.rightsNote: Official Mastercard developer product; use only with approved API credentials and contract terms.

sources.coverage: LoungeKey airport lounge access network evidence
sources.rightsNote: Official public LoungeKey surface; licensed or partner access is required for complete record intake.

sources.coverage: Collinson lounge network and product portfolio evidence
sources.rightsNote: Official Collinson corporate surface; use as network evidence and licensing path, not a raw scrape target.

sources.coverage: Global airport lounge inventory, access rules, amenities, hours, coordinates, and provider metadata
sources.rightsNote: Licensed API provider; no intake without approved commercial terms and key management.

sources.coverage: Airport lounge booking and product inventory evidence
sources.rightsNote: Official API documentation; use only under approved commercial/API terms.

sources.rightsNote: Official public Singapore Airlines lounge page; retain URL provenance for every imported field.

sources.coverage: Qantas and Qantas-published partner lounge locations, operators, coordinates, location text, opening hours, and facilities
sources.rightsNote: Official public Qantas lounge pages; retain URL provenance for every imported field and do not infer unpublished gate or price data.

sources.coverage: Airport private suites, terminal/gate locations, hours, Priority Pass access, and hourly price evidence

sources.coverage: Airport-operated official lounge pages with terminal, gate-area, and operating-hour evidence

sources.coverage: Airport identity, city, country, and coordinates
sources.rightsNote: Open airport reference data; use for normalization only.

sources.coverage: Open venue and amenity enrichment for airport lounge candidate discovery
sources.rightsNote: Open data enrichment only; comply with ODbL attribution and do not treat as canonical lounge inventory.

sources.coverage: Fallback airport geocoding
sources.rightsNote: Fallback only; honor rate limits and cache results.
